# Seven Things I've Learned Getting Companies to Use AI

**From:** Every <hello@every.to>
**Date:** 2026-03-30

Seven Things I've Learned Getting Companies to Use AI




A playbook from the front lines of AI consulting
 ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

| [Also True for Humans](https://every.) [Seven Things I’ve Learned Getting Companies to Use AI](https://every.)[A playbook from the front lines of AI consulting](https://every.) by [Mike Taylor](https://every.)     Midjourney/Every illustration.  *This post was originally a[tweet thread](https://every.) in response to* ***[Sam Parr](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU2V2ZW4gVGhpbmdzIEkndmUgTGVhcm5lZCBHZXR0aW5nIENvbXBhbmllcyB0byBVc2UgQUkiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MDg5LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS90aGVzYW1wYXJyIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjd9)*** *asking how people get their teams to adopt Claude. It touched a nerve, so I wanted to expand on it. I recently joined[Every Consulting](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU2V2ZW4gVGhpbmdzIEkndmUgTGVhcm5lZCBHZXR0aW5nIENvbXBhbmllcyB0byBVc2UgQUkiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MDg5LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9jb25zdWx0aW5nIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjl9) as the head of tech consulting, where we work with mid-to-large-sized companies on AI training and adoption. Here’s what’s working.—[Mi](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU2V2ZW4gVGhpbmdzIEkndmUgTGVhcm5lZCBHZXR0aW5nIENvbXBhbmllcyB0byBVc2UgQUkiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MDg5LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9oYW1tZXJfbXQiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTB9)ke Taylor*  *Was this newsletter forwarded to you? [Sign up](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU2V2ZW4gVGhpbmdzIEkndmUgTGVhcm5lZCBHZXR0aW5nIENvbXBhbmllcyB0byBVc2UgQUkiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MDg5LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9hY2NvdW50IiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjExfQ==) to get it in your inbox.*     ---     Entrepreneur **[Sam Parr](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU2V2ZW4gVGhpbmdzIEkndmUgTGVhcm5lZCBHZXR0aW5nIENvbXBhbmllcyB0byBVc2UgQUkiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MDg5LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS90aGVzYW1wYXJyIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjEyfQ==)** asked a question on X the other day: “How is everyone getting team adoption for Claude? I spent a lot of time on Twitter, as do you. We see all this AI stuff popping up. We’re on top of it, or at least sorta. But how are all you people getting your team to actually use it effectively without spending all their time on Twitter and learning?”  I hear this question in some form on every single consulting engagement. I know the advice I have resonates in meetings, but I’m short on time. So I dictated this post through **[Monologue](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU2V2ZW4gVGhpbmdzIEkndmUgTGVhcm5lZCBHZXR0aW5nIENvbXBhbmllcyB0byBVc2UgQUkiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MDg5LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubW9ub2xvZ3VlLnRvLyIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxM30=)** and used Claude to shape it into something readable. ([Let me know](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU2V2ZW4gVGhpbmdzIEkndmUgTGVhcm5lZCBHZXR0aW5nIENvbXBhbmllcyB0byBVc2UgQUkiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MDg5LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9oYW1tZXJfbXQiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTR9) if this format works for you.)  Here are seven learnings from working with companies through Every Consulting: **1. Buy the model direct, not third-party tools**    ---     **Become a [paid subscriber to Every](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU2V2ZW4gVGhpbmdzIEkndmUgTGVhcm5lZCBHZXR0aW5nIENvbXBhbmllcyB0byBVc2UgQUkiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MDg5LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9zdWJzY3JpYmUiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTV9) to unlock this piece and learn about:**   1. Why mandating AI adoption almost always backfires 2. How to turn skeptics into power users with one counterintuitive task assignment 3. And five more lessons to make AI stick across your team   [Subscribe](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU2V2ZW4gVGhpbmdzIEkndmUgTGVhcm5lZCBHZXR0aW5nIENvbXBhbmllcyB0byBVc2UgQUkiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MDg5LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9zdWJzY3JpYmU_c291cmNlPXBvc3RfYnV0dG9uIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjE2fQ==)  [Every Subscription](https://every.)  [Lock Start free trial](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU2V2ZW4gVGhpbmdzIEkndmUgTGVhcm5lZCBHZXR0aW5nIENvbXBhbmllcyB0byBVc2UgQUkiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MDg5LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9zdWJzY3JpYmU_aGFzaD0lcmVjaXBpZW50Lmhhc2glXHUwMDI2cHVibGljYXRpb249YWxzby10cnVlLWZvci1odW1hbnNcdTAwMjZzb3VyY2U9ZW1haWxfcG9zdF9wYXl3YWxsIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjE4fQ==)    What is included in a subscription? Daily insights from AI pioneers + early access to powerful AI tools  [AI Tools Showcase](https://every.)  Pencil Front-row access to the future of AI  Check In-depth reviews of new models on release day  Check Playbooks and guides for putting AI to work  Check Prompts and use cases for builders    Sparks Bundle of AI software  Sparkle **Sparkle:** Organize your Mac with AI  Cora **Cora:** The most human way to do email  Spiral **Spiral:** Repurpose your content endlessly  Monologue **Monologue:** Effortless voice dictation for your Mac      You received this email because you signed up for emails from [Every](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU2V2ZW4gVGhpbmdzIEkndmUgTGVhcm5lZCBHZXR0aW5nIENvbXBhbmllcyB0byBVc2UgQUkiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MDg5LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50byIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoyMH0=).
